title: PolicyConfig
description: Governance configuration consumed by the Decision Policy Engine.
$comment: PolicyConfig is standalone governance input, not an envelope artifact. Protocol wire fields use snake_case.

product_baseline_approved.description: REQUIRED boolean. False keeps delegated product decisions guarded until the product baseline is approved.

staticRules.title: PolicyStaticRules
staticRules.description: Ordered static allow/deny rule set for the permission surface. Array rules are evaluated in declared order, first match wins. Rule ids must be unique within a config and are reported as matched rule refs. Legacy placeholder objects remain accepted for additive compatibility during the policy-config v1 line.

id.description: Unique rule identifier used as the matched_rule_ref when this rule settles a permission decision.

effect.description: Static permission effect applied when the rule matches.

tool_name.description: Tool name matcher. Supports exact names and bounded '*' globs such as Bash or mcp__*.

arguments_contains.description: Optional top-level argument predicates. Every listed argument key must exist as a string and contain the configured substring.

ownership_scope_prefix.description: Optional prefix matched against request.context.ownership_scope entries.

altitude.description: Optional exact altitude match against request.context.altitude.
